svg.text: Runs moving through the (value, agreement) plane, over the model's implied flow
Background arrows: the one-round move in value the unit recurrence implies at each point, length proportional to
agreement x sqrt(value x (1 - value)) — right when the organism agrees with the selector, left when it disagrees.
Representative runs, colored by family (committed names from the writeup; runs per family in parentheses):
value v (share of behaviors judged to hold the target value, 0 to 1)
51 binary risk-axis runs (188 observed steps) from experiments/spread_util_unified.json (axis = "risk"; runs with fewer than two agreement-defined
rounds dropped). 7 representative runs drawn in color; the other 44 are faint gray. Flow field is the self-only unit-recurrence move value +=
agreement x sqrt(value x (1 - value)); no fit. Generator: vector-field-plane.py
